xPosts.content: When dealing with tight gpu memory situations try to change a PyTorch version to both newer and older and it might just do the trick. I get massively different memory usage patterns with pt 2.4 to 2.8. e.g. today I tried last night's nightly and it was using 6GB less memory

xPosts.worthReading: Practical tip for ML practitioners facing memory constraints during training.
